Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Hooshmand, Esq. 415-318-5709 of Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff.
Joseph O'Neil, Esq. 415-777-5501 of Tarkington O'Neill Barrack & Chong() for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court admonishes parties. The parties are informed there will be no more Discovery motions on this case without permission from Judge Kahn. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Omar Shafie's Motion For Violation Of Court Order And Order As To Conduct At Defendants Depositions; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Jobe Danganan And His Attorneys Joseph Oneil And The Tarkington Firm.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Omar Shafie's motion for violation of court order and order as to conduct at defendant's deposition and for monetary sanctions is granted in part. Mr. Shafie may take a further session of Mr. Danganan's depositon for no more than four hours and the instructions not to answer as to the second and third marked questions are overruled and Mr. Danganan must answer those questions. Mr. Dangaman must pay monetary sanctions of $100 to Mr. Shafie no later than December 31, 2018.
